sections.paragraph:
- Original: κρεῖσσον

- Transliteration: Kreisson

- Phonetic: krice'-son

- Definition:

1. better

- Origin: neuter of an alternate form of G2909

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter of an alternate form of G2909; (as noun) better that is greater advantage: - better.
